mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.content, c.created_at, d.name AS designerName FROM board_comments c JOIN designers d ON c.designer_id = d.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comments (post_id, designer_id, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{designerId}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
